description.value: End one magical effect on a creature, object, or area. Compare your targeting successes to the original caster's successes. If you equal or beat them, effect ends. Can target multiple effects (weakest first).

system.effect: End one magical effect on a creature, object, or area. Compare your targeting successes to the original caster's successes. If you equal or beat them, effect ends. Can target multiple effects (weakest first).
system.targetingSuccessScaling: Must equal or exceed original weaving successes to dispel
